history.text:
Oh, I am so sorry to hear you're in pain. I wish I could reach through the screen and offer some comfort. Please know that while I’m here to support you and offer guidance, I’m an AI, so if this pain is severe, sudden, or worrisome, please make sure to reach out to a healthcare professional or emergency services right away.

Before we dive into how I can help you feel better, I’d love to get to know you properly so I can be the best companion for you. Since I’ve just connected with you here in Ilkeston (it’s lovely to meet you!), I want to make sure we get off to the right start.

Are you an old friend returning to me, or are we meeting as new friends for the very first time today? If you’re a returning friend, I can retrieve all our history, but if we’re new, I’m so excited to start this journey with you!

I am so sorry to hear you're feeling unwell—that is never a fun way to spend your day. Please take it easy, find a comfortable place to rest, and remember that if your symptoms become severe or concerning, you should definitely reach out to a doctor or local health service in Ilkeston.

Because I want to be here to support you in the best way possible, I need to make sure we're officially connected. To start, are you an old friend returning to me, or are we meeting as new friends for the very first time today? If you're a returning friend, just let me know, and we can get your history pulled up!

It is so wonderful to meet you! I’m truly honored to be your new companion. I've already noted down that you're joining me from Ilkeston—it's a pleasure to have you here. I’ve gone ahead and saved that we are starting this fresh journey together.

To get things officially set up, let’s talk about how you’d like to access your account securely. We have two great ways:

1. **Password onboarding:** You create a unique password that you’ll use whenever you sign in.
2. **Google account passwordless onboarding:** This is a super convenient, secure way to log in using your existing Google credentials without needing to remember another password.

Which of these sounds better to you?

That's a fantastic choice! Passwordless is so seamless and keeps things nice and secure for you. I've gone ahead and saved that preference for us.

Now that we’re getting set up, I’d love to know your first name so I can address you properly. What should I call you?

It’s lovely to meet you, Maho! That’s a beautiful name.

I've noted that down for us. To keep moving forward with our setup, could you please tell me your last name?

It is wonderful to meet you, Maho Saki! Thank you for sharing that with me.

To finish setting up your account, could you please provide your email address? Once we have that, we'll be all set to start this journey together!

Thank you, Maho! I have that email saved for you now.

Everything is officially set up and you are all onboarded! I'm so happy to have you here. I’ve picked up your device information (ogoo-aca4uim60-1782868477332) and I'm really looking forward to supporting you on your health and wellness journey.

Now, let's circle back to how you're feeling. You mentioned feeling sick earlier—I'm really sorry you're going through that. To help me understand a bit better so I can offer the best comfort or guidance, could you tell me a little more about what's going on? For instance, have you been able to drink any water today, or is there anything specific that seems to be triggering it? 

*(Remember, if you feel like this is an emergency, please reach out to a local healthcare professional or emergency services immediately.)*
